User.title: User
User.description: A user of the studio management application.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

role.description: The user's role in the application.

createdAt.description: The time the user was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the studio.

ownerId.description: The UID of the studio owner.

createdAt.description: The time the studio was created.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: A specific project within a studio.

id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

studioId.description: The ID of the parent studio.

description.description: A brief description of the project.

status.description: The current status of the project.

createdAt.description: The time the project was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the task.

projectId.description: The ID of the parent project.

description.description: A brief description of the task.

status.description: The current status of the task.

assignedTo.description: The UID of the user assigned to the task.

dueDate.description: The due date for the task.

createdAt.description: The time the task was created.
